_comment: Minutes of the Quarterly Review — stream prop (renamed paper + lore, the memo_44c ship shape per the verifier: written_book pages need double quotes, paper is the ruled artifact form; the minutes TEXT is delivered by the sidequest/minutes/hear_minutes staged tellraw). Given by the door-side loiter at the Hua Zhan branch office. Closing lore line is the exact memo_44c boilerplate — the staged erasure never walks backwards, it just climbs a rank.

lore.text: Yield at quota. Dispatch ahead of plan.
Reminder — there was never a founder.
